queries.question: List all libraries and their locations
queries.sql: select lc.name, lb.library_name as library from Libraries lb inner join Building_Name lc on lb.building_id = lc.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?library_name WHERE {
  ?lb a :Libraries .
  ?lc a :Buildings .
  ?lb p:hasBuilding_Name ?lc .
  ?lc p:name ?name .
  ?lb p:library_name ?library_name .
}

queries.question: List all libraries and their locations
queries.sql: select lc.university_name, lb.library_name as library from Libraries lb inner join University lc on lb.university_id = lc.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?university_name ?library_name WHERE {
  ?lb a :Libraries .
  ?lc a :Universities .
  ?lb p:hasUniversity ?lc .
  ?lc p:university_name ?university_name .
  ?lb p:library_name ?library_name .
}

queries.question: List all libraries and their locations
queries.sql: select un.university_name, lc.name, lb.library_name as library from Libraries lb inner join Building_Name lc on lb.building_id = lc.id  join University un on lb.university_id = un.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?university_name ?name ?library_name WHERE {
  ?lb a :Libraries .
  ?lc a :Buildings .
  ?lb p:hasBuilding_Name ?lc .
  ?un a :Universities .
  ?lb p:hasUniversity ?un .
  ?un p:university_name ?university_name .
  ?lc p:name ?name .
  ?lb p:library_name ?library_name .
}

queries.question: In what university is library A located?
queries.sql: select university_name from Libraries lb inner join University lc on lb.university_id = lc.id where lb.library_name = 'Library A';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?university_name WHERE {
  ?lb a :Libraries .
  ?lc a :Universities .
  ?lb p:hasUniversity ?lc .
  ?lc p:university_name ?university_name .
  ?lb p:library_name ?library_name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?library_name_f) = STR("Library A"))
}

queries.question: What is the location of library A?

SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?lb a :Libraries .
  ?lc a :Buildings .
  ?lb p:hasBuilding_Name ?lc .
  ?lc p:name ?name .
  ?lb p:library_name ?library_name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?library_name_f) = STR("Library A"))
}
